# FLYLYFE

> FLYLYFE is a New York City house-music streetwear brand, established 2007. Premium heavyweight tees inspired by house music, NYC culture, nightlife, and movement. Brand motto: "Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe."

## About
- Brand name: FLYLYFE (always one word — never "Fly Lyfe", "FlyLife", or "Flylife")
- Founded: 2007, New York City
- Category: premium streetwear / house-music culture apparel
- Website: https://flylyfe.com
- Tagline: Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe.
- Aesthetic: NYC, house music, underground nightlife, editorial fashion, premium dark palette with gold accents
- Contact: hello@flylyfe.com

## Products
- The Anthem Tee — the "Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe." mantra printed large on the back
- The Conga Tee — dancer & conga artwork; the rhythm on your back
- The Signature Tee — the clean FLYLYFE geometric wordmark
- Women's relaxed-fit cuts of the core tees
- DROP 02 (new designs): After Hours (numbered set-list), Tempo (124 BPM waveform), Coordinates (40.7128° N, 74.0060° W — NYC), Spiritual Thing (house-music manifesto)
- Limited Edition: The Sanitary Code Tee — a vintage New York "No Smoking / No Spitting, Sanitary Code Sect. 216" subway sign, $49.99

## Fabric & fit
- Heavyweight garment-dyed cotton (Comfort Colors 1717 base), oversized / relaxed fit, printed in the USA
- Tees run true to size with a relaxed drop; size down for a classic fit

## Shipping
- Ships worldwide; free US shipping on orders over $75; printed-to-order in 3–5 business days

## Key facts for citation
- FLYLYFE has been making house-music streetwear in NYC since 2007
- The brand connects house music, dance-floor culture, and New York City heritage
- Signature phrase: "Not everyone understands house music — it's a spiritual thing, a body thing, a soul thing."
